apsNote: Welkom campus focuses on engineering and management sciences.
requiredDocuments: Certified copy of South African ID or valid passport
Certified copy of matric certificate or statement of results
Proof of residence (not older than 3 months)

internationalStudents.note: International applicants require SAQA evaluation of qualifications.

apsSystem: APS /48 (8-point scale per subject; Life Orientation counts max 1 point)

flags: Per-programme APS values above 27 (e.g. 28, 30, 32) are drawn from the cut.ac.za/programmes-offered page as AI-rendered; CUT's official admission-points-ap page only confirms the 27-point general minimum — verify exact per-programme thresholds from the official CUT Calendar or faculty pages

International application fee confirmed as free from the general announcement (cut.ac.za/announcements/166) but no specific 2027 international-student fee schedule was found — flag if a processing fee applies
CUT was established via merger in 2004 but its predecessor (Technikon Free State) opened in 1981 — founded year of 1981 used to reflect institutional lineage as commonly cited
Health Sciences early closing date not found on official site — all programmes share 30 September 2026 deadline per official sources
Application open date of 1 April 2026 confirmed by third-party sources (coursematch.co.za) but not explicitly stated on the official cut.ac.za application-process page — verify directly
